name: my-pi-themes
description: 14 custom themes for Pi Coding Agent: neapple, monokai-pro, onedark, e-ink, tokyo-dark, and more
readme:
# my-pi-themes

14 custom themes for Pi Coding Agent.

## Themes

| Theme | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `neapple` | Warm orange-brown palette |
| `neapple-light` | Light variant |
| `monokai-pro` | Monokai professional |
| `monokai-pro-light` | Monokai light |
| `onedark-pro` | Atom One Dark |
| `onedark-darker` | Darker variant |
| `onedark-pro-light` | One Dark light |
| `tokyo-dark` | Tokyo night dark |
| `miasma` | Green-tinted dark |
| `solarized-osaka` | Solarized variant |
| `e-ink` | E-ink friendly |
| `e-ink-dark` | E-ink dark |
| `gruvbox-light` | Gruvbox light |
| `noctis-lux` | Noctis lux |

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:my-pi-themes
```

Or add to `settings.json`:

```json
{
  "themes": ["/path/to/my-pi-themes/themes"]
}
```

## Use

Select a theme:

```
/settings
```

Or set in `settings.json`:

```json
{
  "theme": "neapple"
}
```
